title: Equity Lens
description: A futuristic financial research terminal with Liquid Glass UI, AI-powered analysis, and local-first architecture. Combines real-time market data, SEC EDGAR fundamentals, TA-Lib technical indicators, FRED macroeconomic data, news intelligence, and DeepSeek-generated thesis analysis into a single application.
features: SEC EDGAR fundamentals — revenue, net income, EPS, balance sheet, ratios
TA-Lib technicals — RSI, MACD, SMA/EMA, Bollinger Bands, ATR
FRED macroeconomic dashboard — 9 economic indicators
AI thesis generation with bull/base/bear scenarios
TradingView Lightweight Charts
Stock screener — 80-ticker universe with filters
Portfolio P&L tracking with Alpaca broker sync
Alert center with Discord and email notifications
Insider trading (Form 4) and institutional ownership (13F)
SEC filings browser with DCF valuation
highlights: Liquid Glass design system with cosmic eclipse background
Provider factory for pluggable data sources
Full CI/CD with gitleaks security scanning

title: Nexus
description: A CLI tool that gives AI agents persistent memory across sessions. One binary, no daemon, no dependencies beyond Go. Solves context loss between sessions by tracking projects, sessions, decisions, preferences, and learnings with semantic search.
features: Cross-session memory for AI coding agents
Project and session tracking with semantic search
Decision and preference learning over time
FTS5 full-text search with ranking
Single binary with zero runtime dependencies
highlights: Go CLI with no runtime dependencies
MCP server wrapper for Claude Code integration

title: Corvade
description: A local AI agent control plane that sits between your agents and LLM APIs as a transparent proxy, capturing every call and visualizing execution as a real-time graph. Think Wireshark for AI agents.
features: Transparent proxy between agents and any LLM API
Real-time execution graph visualization
Full prompt and response capture
Token usage tracking per call
Local-first — all data stays on your machine
highlights: Companion to Vexade (pre-production agent dev platform)
Works with any OpenAI-compatible API

title: Ink and Bone
tagline: Private, local AI Game Master for any TTRPG
description: A private, local AI Game Master for 13 tabletop RPG systems with no cloud, no subscriptions, no limits. The AI GM narrates, your dashboard updates live. Supports D&D 5e, Pathfinder 2e, Call of Cthulhu, and more with full rulebooks, character sheets, and combat tracking.
features: 13 TTRPG systems with full rulebook integration
Local LLM via Ollama — zero cloud dependency
Persistent campaign state with session history
Combat tracker with initiative, HP, and conditions
Character sheet management with leveling
AI-generated NPCs, encounters, and loot
highlights: Fully offline — runs entirely on local hardware
Unlimited campaigns, no subscription fees

title: Obsidian Nexus
tagline: 3D cyberpunk data vault for your knowledge base
description: A 3D interactive cyberpunk data vault that transforms your Obsidian knowledge base into a navigable digital world. Built in Godot 4.6 with Vulkan Forward+ rendering. Each note becomes a physical space, connections become walkable paths.
features: 3D navigation of Obsidian vaults
Visual connection mapping between notes
Vulkan Forward+ rendering pipeline
Cyberpunk aesthetic with neon and glass
Real-time graph traversal
highlights: Built entirely in Godot 4 game engine
Procedural world generation from markdown structure

title: Aether
description: Turns your physical space into a living, connected environment. Lights, sound, projections, sensors, and AI agents orchestrated through a spatial computing layer. Rooms become interfaces, walls become displays.
features: Spatial computing layer for physical spaces
Multi-sensor orchestration (lights, sound, projection)
AI agent integration for ambient intelligence
Room-scale interactive experiences
highlights: Visionary concept blending IoT, AI, and spatial computing

title: Rift
description: A keyboard-first file manager for Linux built with Tauri v2, React, and Rust. Vi-style keybindings, fuzzy file search, split panes, bulk rename, image preview, archive handling, and Git status indicators.
features: Keyboard-first with vi-style keybindings
Fuzzy file search and instant filtering
Split pane layout for parallel directories
Bulk rename, archive handling, image preview
Git status indicators for tracked files
highlights: Built with Tauri v2 — lightweight, cross-platform
Rust backend for maximum performance

title: Cosmic Timeline
description: Scroll through 13.8 billion years of cosmic history from the Big Bang to the present. An immersive WebGL journey that scales from quarks to galactic superclusters.
features: Full 13.8 billion year timeline at multiple scales
WebGL-rendered cosmic visualizations
Interactive zoom from quantum to galactic scales
Key events: Big Bang, star formation, life, humanity
highlights: Single HTML file — no build step required
Runs entirely in the browser, no backend

title: Pulse
tagline: What should I pay attention to right now?
description: Personal command center CLI that answers what you should pay attention to right now. Combines morning briefings, project health monitoring, and AI service cost tracking into a single terminal dashboard.
features: Morning briefings with project status summary
Project health monitoring (repos, CI, dependencies)
AI service cost tracking (OpenRouter, APIs)
Configurable notifications and alerting
highlights: Replaces daily standup with automation
Monitors multiple projects from one CLI

title: Wraith
description: AI-powered platform for learning penetration testing and bug bounty hunting. Combines adaptive learning, workflow automation, local uncensored LLMs, and real-world vulnerability scenarios.
features: Adaptive learning paths for penetration testing
Bug bounty simulation with real vulnerability patterns
Local uncensored LLM integration
Workflow automation for recon and exploitation
Progress tracking and skill assessment
highlights: Combines offensive security with AI mentorship
Runs entirely locally for safe practice

title: Sentinel MCP
description: An MCP server for multi-project dependency security auditing. Scans Go, Node.js, and Python projects for vulnerabilities, outdated packages, and license risks. Integrates directly with AI coding assistants.
features: Cross-language scanning across Go, Node, and Python
Vulnerability detection with severity scoring
License compliance checking
Direct integration with Claude via MCP
highlights: Part of the DTG404 MCP server ecosystem
Real-time security feedback during development

title: Infra MCP
tagline: Docker monitoring for AI coding assistants
description: An MCP server giving Claude Code real-time visibility into local infrastructure — Docker containers and system health. Container logs, resource usage, image management, and health checks through natural language.
features: Real-time Docker container inspection
System resource monitoring (CPU, memory, disk)
Container log access through Claude
Image and volume management
highlights: Gives AI agents infrastructure awareness
Part of the DTG404 MCP server suite

title: TF Plan Explainer
description: A web app that translates raw terraform plan output into plain-English risk summaries, cost estimates, vulnerability reports, and Kubernetes security audits. Stop reading 2000-line plan diffs.
features: Plain-English risk assessment of infrastructure changes
Cost impact estimation for cloud resources
Security vulnerability scanning of planned resources
Kubernetes security audit integration
highlights: Turns 2000-line plan diffs into actionable summaries
Multiple analysis perspectives in one interface
